description: Same R3 fail-fast as TB-001 but with a YELLOW (warnings-only) static production gate, proving the 'any' in the (FAIL, any, SKIPPED) decision-table row covers the YELLOW column too. t3 is SKIPPED because the behavioral tier never runs after a Tier 1 floor miss.
why: § 5 R3 fail-fast independent of the t2 column; § 6 R7 (t1=FAIL). Row (FAIL, any, SKIPPED) -> FAIL.
